name: VanEck Avalanche ETF
summary: VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX) is a Delaware statutory trust formed on March 10, 2025, that operates as a passive investment vehicle holding AVAX, the native token of the Avalanche blockchain network. The Trust issues shares listed on Nasdaq representing fractional ownership of AVAX holdings. It may also stake a portion of its AVAX to earn staking rewards. It is sponsored by VanEck Digital Assets, LLC and managed with custodians Anchorage Digital Bank N.A. and Coinbase Custody Trust Company, LLC.

products.name: VanEck Avalanche ETF (VAVX)
products.description: A passive exchange-traded fund holding AVAX tokens listed on Nasdaq, offering investors exposure to AVAX price performance and staking rewards.

partnerships.description: Serves as one of the Trust's AVAX custodians, holding AVAX on behalf of the Trust.
Serves as one of the Trust's AVAX custodians, holding AVAX on behalf of the Trust.

partnerships.description: Serves as the Trust's administrator, transfer agent, and cash custodian.
Serves as the Delaware trustee of the Trust.
Serves as index sponsor and administrator for the MarketVector Avalanche Benchmark Rate used to price AVAX for the Trust.
